data.title: Ex-Trump adviser Bo Hines named CEO of Tether's USAT stablecoin, a US-regulated, dollar-backed project. Joined in April.
data.description: The ex-White House cryptocurrency advisor, who recently joined Tether in April, is set to take over as the CEO of its upcoming "US-approved, dollar-supported stablecoin."

data.title: Oncotelic Therapeutics highlights 2 years of progress with its late-stage pipeline, showcasing clinical and regulatory advancements.
data.description: In Agoura Hills, California, on September 12, 2025, Oncotelic Therapeutics, Inc. (OTCQB: OTLC), a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focusing on innovative oncology and immunotherapy treatments, shared key achievements from the last two years. The company highlighted significant advancements in clinical development and regulatory recognition for its primary drug candidates.

data.title: Dow Jones falls on Friday, Nasdaq outperforms after inflation survey. Gemini IPO launches. Furniture stock sinks.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline and is currently testing a crucial threshold. The Gemini IPO is scheduled to commence trading on the stock market today. In today's stock market activity, the Nasdaq outperformed the Dow following an inflation survey. Additionally, a furniture company experienced a decline in its stock value. This information was provided by Investor's Business Daily.
FAA Recommends Fines Worth $3.1 Million Against Boeing for Safety Violations
Pfizer Shares Drop 3%, Moderna Falls 6.3%
Changes in Société BIC’s Board of Directors.

data.title: Report on Automotive ADAS Cameras in China and Globally for 2025 features 19 Chinese and 16 Overseas ADAS Camera Enterprises. From Jan to May 2025, installations for new passenger cars in China was 33.160 million, a 38.6% increase from the previous year.
data.description: A recent report on the "Automotive ADAS Camera Report, 2025" has been included in the offering of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The installations of side-view cameras are continuously increasing, with a growth rate exceeding 90%. Between January and May 2025, installations of ADAS cameras for new passenger cars in China, including front-view, side-view, and surround view cameras, totaled 33.160 million, marking a 38.6% year-on-year increase. In 2024, this figure stood at 76.424 million, representing a year-on-year increase.

data.title: Abivax to be included in CAC Mid 60 and SBF 120 indices after Euronext Paris annual review.
data.description: A recent report highlighted the alarming rise in unemployment rates in the country. According to the data provided, the national unemployment rate has surged to 8.2%, marking a substantial increase from the previous month. This spike has translated to approximately 2.6 million individuals joining the ranks of the unemployed. The data also revealed that certain sectors, such as manufacturing and hospitality, have been hit the hardest, experiencing job losses on a significant scale. Economists have expressed concerns about the lasting impact of this trend on the overall economy and emphasized the need for swift and effective intervention to mitigate further damage.
Swearing-in ceremony after Nepal's president named former Chief Justice Sushila Karki as the interim premier, Nepal’s first woman to head the government

data.title: USAT by Tether will be led by ex-Trump adviser as CEO, a "US-regulated, dollar-backed stablecoin," following $2B acquisition in April.
data.description: In April, the ex-White House crypto adviser decided to join Tether. He is set to become the CEO of their forthcoming stablecoin, backed by US regulation and pegged to the dollar.

data.title: Chilean salmon market to reach $399.37M by 2033 from $188M in 2024, with a CAGR of 8.73% from 2025 to 2033.
data.description: The latest report on the Chile Salmon Market forecasts significant growth, estimating a surge from US$188 million in 2024 to US$399.37 million by 2033, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.73% during the period from 2025 to 2033. Key factors contributing to this growth include rising worldwide demand for seafood, expanding export opportunities, adoption of sustainable aquaculture methods, government support, advancements in technology, efficient logistics, and heightened investments in production infrastructure.

data.title: Japan's Tuna Fish Market projected to hit US$2.53 billion by 2033 due to rising domestic demand and premium seafood interest.
data.description: A report on the Japan Tuna Fish Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings, projecting growth to US$1.94 billion by 2024 and an estimated US$2.53 billion by 2033. The market is expected to experience a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 2.98% from 2025 to 2033. The growth is attributed to factors such as a rise in domestic consumption, a strong seafood culture, and heightened demand for high-quality tuna in retail and foodservice sectors.

data.title: Pavlov Media (AS23473) joins FD-IX Indianapolis with 100 Gigabit capacity port. Welcome to the network!
data.description: In Indianapolis on September 12, 2025, FD-IX welcomed Pavlov Media, a top fiber-based broadband services provider (AS23473), to their Indianapolis network. Pavlov Media has set up a 100 Gigabit Ethernet (100 GbE) port, expanding connectivity options for users.

data.title: Antigravity showcases world's first 8K 360 drone at IFA 2025, Berlin. Key event for tech with impressive debut.
data.description: In Berlin on September 12, 2025, the global consumer tech industry congregated at IFA, a renowned technology trade show. This year, Antigravity made its inaugural appearance at the event, which is a significant milestone for the company. IFA is considered one of the largest technology trade shows globally, attracting a substantial number of attendees. Antigravity's debut at IFA 2025 is a noteworthy moment in the company's history as it showcases their products and innovations to a wide audience for the first time.
Virbac releases its financial report for the first six months of 2025.

data.title: El Salvador's president Bukele claims he buys 1 BTC daily, but IMF denies. Are they mistaken?
data.description: President Nayib Bukele of El Salvador, a prominent supporter of Bitcoin, claims to purchase one Bitcoin daily. However, the International Monetary Fund (IMF) disputes this assertion, suggesting Bukele's claim may be inaccurate. This conflicting information raises questions about the accuracy of the President's statements regarding his daily Bitcoin purchases. Both parties hold differing perspectives on Bukele's alleged daily acquisition of one Bitcoin, highlighting the discrepancy between the President's assertions and the IMF's conflicting viewpoint.

data.title: Expert predicts Tesla stock is a buy again as EV sector revives. Trader Dan Nathan bullish, sees Tesla set to break out. Stock racing higher.
data.description: A notable surge is occurring in Wall Street as electric vehicles regain attention, leading to a shift in the market's view on Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA). Renowned trader Dan Nathan, from CNBC's "Fast Money," recently expressed optimism about Tesla's stock, believing it is on the verge of a significant breakthrough. Despite a challenging period for the EV industry, Nathan perceives a revival, particularly with Tesla poised for growth by the quarter-end, driven by a blend of technical aspects and a more positive outlook. For more details, including insights on the technical analysis, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Increase in deportations offsets slow domestic hiring, stabilizing labor market despite weakening demand.
data.description: The country has experienced a significant increase in immigrants, leading to a reduction in worker shortages. However, the recent expulsion of these immigrants is currently concealing the country's declining demand for labor.
